div.div:
Heads up! This ticket is still marked as
— update the status to keep your customer informed.

div.span: Ready to close this ticket? Mark it as resolved.

input.t-att-disabled: 'disabled' if (public_board and not board_token) else None

div.t-attf-style: width:{{ (100 * len([c for c in task['checklist'] if c['is_done']])) // len(task['checklist']) if task['checklist'] else 0 }}%

div.p: Click + Add another list to create your first stage.

t.t-if: 'image' not in att['mimetype'] and 'pdf' not in att['mimetype'] and 'word' not in att['mimetype'] and 'docx' not in att['mimetype'] and 'sheet' not in att['mimetype'] and 'xlsx' not in att['mimetype']

t.div: No documents linked to this project yet. Admins can attach docs during project configuration.

div.h6: Internal Team Notes — not visible to customer

t.div: No notes yet. Add the first one below.

textarea.placeholder: Type your reply to the customer…

input.placeholder: e.g. To Do, In Progress, Review…

div.p: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
They'll receive an email with a link to view this board.
This board link is no longer valid or has expired. Board access links are tied to specific tickets and may have been revoked.
div.div: Please ask your project admin or focal person to resend your board access link.
div.p: Need help? Contact your support team.
